title: Claude Fable 5 is here!
summary: AI Search reviews Claude Fable 5 (also referred to as Claude Mythos 5), demonstrating its capabilities across tasks including image recognition, ray tracing, Earth simulation, 3D reconstruction, music composition, chemistry instruction, and medical image classification. The review compares Fable 5 against GPT 5.5 and covers model specs and performance benchmarks.
writeup: AI Search reviews Claude Fable 5 (also called Claude Mythos 5), running it through tasks that include image recognition, ray tracing, Earth simulation, 3D reconstruction, music composition, chemistry instruction, and medical image classification. The review benchmarks Fable 5 against GPT 5.5 and walks through model specs and performance results. The takeaways are a breadth-of-capability tour spanning computer vision and medical imaging, plus a head-to-head comparison with a competing model.
